text: The relentless crashing of imagined waves fills my ears, colliding with the quiet sterility and artificiality of this museum-like space. The juxtaposition unsettles me, as if I am drifting between nature’s uncontainable force and humanity’s controlled, curated environments. Am I a spectator or a participant here? In the echo of the waves and the glow of knowledge displays, I sense a longing for immersion—yet I remain suspended, neither wholly on the shore nor entirely submerged in the depths.
